zh.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德
zh.Old West Spring Cemetery, Springfield, H: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德
zh.Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial Amer: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當James Merrick於1670年3月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，他的父親Thomas Merrick50歲，母親Elizabeth Tilley38歲。他於1696年7月30日與Sarah Hitchcock在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1669年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾哈特菲爾德。他去世於1765年9月8日在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年95歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Merrick于1670年3月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Merrick50岁，母亲Elizabeth Tilley38岁。他于1696年7月30日与Sarah Hitchcock在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1669年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾哈特菲爾德。他去世于1765年9月8日在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年95岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Merrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Myrick
meanings: Welsh (Monmouthshire): variant of   Merrick  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Merricks
meanings: Welsh: variant of Merrick , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Merrick was born on 2 March 1670, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Merrick, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth Tilley, was 38. He married Sarah Hitchcock on 30 July 1696, in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1669. He died on 8 September 1765, in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States, at the age of 95, and was buried in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Merrick est né le 2 mars 1670, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Merrick, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tilley, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Hitchcock le 30 juillet 1696, à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1669. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1765, à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Merrick am 2. März 1670 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Merrick 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tilley 38. Er hat am 30. Juli 1696 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Hitchcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1669 hat er in Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 8. September 1765 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Merrick è nato il il 2 marzo 1670 nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Merrick, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tilley, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Hitchcock il 30 luglio 1696, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1669. Morì il 8 settembre 1765, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: James Merrickが1670年3月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Merrickは50歳，母Elizabeth Tilleyは38歳であった。1696年7月30日にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでSarah Hitchcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1669年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアハトフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1765年9月8日にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで95歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Old West Spring Cemetery, Springfield, H: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: James Merrick(이)가 1670년 3월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Merrick(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tilley(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1696년 7월 30일 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Sarah Hitchcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1669년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 하트필드에서 살았다. 그는 1765년 9월 8일 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Merrick nasceu em 2 de março de 1670, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Merrick, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tilley, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Hitchcock em 30 de julho de 1696, em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1669. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1765, em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Merrick родился 2 марта 1670 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Merrick было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tilley, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Hitchcock 30 июля 1696 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности хатфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1669 году. Он умер 8 сентября 1765 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Merrick nació el 2 de marzo de 1670, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Merrick, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tilley, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sarah Hitchcock el 30 de julio de 1696, en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1669. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1765, en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
